# Al Binaa Construction & Industry SAOC

> Al Binaa Construction & Industry SAOC is a premium construction contractor based in Muscat, Oman. Founded in 1997 under the Al Khonji Group, the company delivers structural, MEP (mechanical, electrical and plumbing), and interior finishing services under a single contract and management structure. Commercial Registration: 2693300. ISO 9001:2015 certified.

## Key Facts

- Founded: 1997
- Location: 1212 Way 2708, Muscat 100, Oman
- Phone: +968 24 693300
- Sectors: Residential, Commercial, Hospitality
- Employees: 600+ directly employed (not agency-sourced)
- Projects completed: 20+ across Oman
- Total contract value delivered: OMR 52M+
- Certifications: ISO 9001:2015
- Commercial Registration: 2693300

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.albinaa.om/en): Company overview, key statistics, services summary, featured projects, client testimonials
- [About](https://www.albinaa.om/en/about): Company history since 1997, founding by Qaboos Al Khonji under Al Khonji Group, team structure, heritage chapters, CSR commitments, plant and equipment
- [Services](https://www.albinaa.om/en/services): Three integrated divisions — Structure & Civil, MEP Systems, Interior Finishing & Quality — with scope of work for each
- [Structural & Civil Construction](https://www.albinaa.om/en/services/structure): Full-scope structural and civil contracting for commercial, residential, and industrial projects across Muscat and Oman
- [MEP Systems](https://www.albinaa.om/en/services/mep): Mechanical, electrical and plumbing engineering and installation — design-build MEP contracting in Oman
- [Interior Finishing & Quality](https://www.albinaa.om/en/services/interior-finishing): Luxury interior finishing, quality assurance, defect rectification and snag management
- [Projects](https://www.albinaa.om/en/projects): Portfolio of completed and ongoing construction projects in Oman
- [Qualifications](https://www.albinaa.om/en/qualifications): ISO 9001:2015 certification, Commercial Registration, contractor credentials and verifiable track record
- [Contact](https://www.albinaa.om/en/contact): Enquiry form, address, and phone number

## Notable Completed Projects

- [Rimal I](https://www.albinaa.om/en/projects/rimal-i) — 242-unit residential complex, Bausher, Muscat. Client: AQAR Al Khonji Real Estate. Contract value: OMR 13.6M. Delivered on schedule.
- [OFFICE 1991](https://www.albinaa.om/en/projects/office-1991) — 9-storey commercial tower, Al Khuwair, Muscat. Client: Al Khonji Real Estate & Development LLC. Contract value: OMR 12.1M. Delivered ahead of schedule.
- [Al Wadi Complex](https://www.albinaa.om/en/projects/al-wadi-complex) — 21 luxury townhouses, Al Khuwair, Muscat. Contract value: OMR 9.45M.
- [The Office](https://www.albinaa.om/en/projects/the-office) — 80-unit commercial complex, Al Khuwair, Muscat. Contract value: OMR 7.25M.
- [Desert Nights Resort](https://www.albinaa.om/en/projects/desert-nights-resort) — Full renovation of 18,000 sqm desert resort, Wahiba Sands, Oman. Contract value: OMR 2.85M.
- [Al Wadi Hotel Sohar](https://www.albinaa.om/en/projects/al-wadi-hotel-sohar) — 110-room hotel renovation, Sohar, Oman. Client: Oman Hotels. Contract value: OMR 600k.
- [Sur Plaza Hotel](https://www.albinaa.om/en/projects/sur-plaza-hotel) — Best Western-branded hotel renovation, Sur, Oman. Client: Oman Hotels. Contract value: OMR 300k.

## Active Projects (2024–25)

- Rimal II — 148-unit residential complex, Bausher, Muscat. Contract value: OMR 13M.
- Ibis Style Hotel Ruwi — 183-room new-build hotel, Ruwi, Muscat. Contract value: OMR 5.2M.
- Souq Al Hamidiyya — 190-shop commercial development, Ruwi, Muscat.
- The Edge Building — Al Khuwair, Muscat.
- Al Khuwair Building — Al Khuwair, Muscat.
- Al Hail Building — Al Hail, Muscat.

## Arabic Version

The full site is available in Arabic at https://www.albinaa.om/ar with identical content.
